display.purpose: Major page anchors and top-level documentation headings only.

headline.purpose: Section leaders, panel titles, and strong navigation headings.

title.purpose: Utility component titles and grouped navigation labels.

body.purpose: Long-form reading in Chinese and mixed-script documentation.

label.purpose: Buttons, chips, toggles, and compact utility controls.

shadows.name: utility-lift
shadows.purpose: Edit-link pills and similar utility CTAs.

shadows.name: media-lift
shadows.purpose: Showcase media, badges, and segmented install controls.

motion.name: state-ease
motion.purpose: Default hover and focus transitions for small utility controls.

motion.name: dialog-ease
motion.purpose: Enter transition for visible utility affordances and overlays.

motion.name: gradient-wave
motion.purpose: Reserved for install CTAs only; disable when reduced motion is requested.

components.name: Install Button
components.description: Primary utility CTA for download and install actions.
components.html: Download Client
components.css: .ds-install-button{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.5rem;min-height:2.75rem;padding:.625rem 1rem;border:1px solid transparent;border-radius:.875rem;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0080FF 0%,#00CCCC 50%,#22C55E 100%);background-size:200% 200%;color:#ffffff;font:600 .9375rem/1.2 var(--sl-font);text-decoration:none;box-shadow:0 12px 28px rgba(15,23,42,.16);transition:transform 180ms ease-out,box-shadow 180ms ease-out,background-position 180ms ease-out;animation:ds-gradient-wave 3s ease-in-out infinite}.ds-install-button svg{width:1rem;height:1rem;flex:0 0 auto}.ds-install-button:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 16px 32px rgba(15,23,42,.2);background-position:100% 50%}.ds-install-button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid rgba(59,130,246,.4);outline-offset:3px}@keyframes ds-gradient-wave{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}

components.name: Docs Edit Link
components.description: Canonical pill-shaped utility CTA used near page titles and footer metadata.
components.html: Suggest an edit
components.css: .ds-edit-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.55rem;padding:.625rem .95rem;border:1px solid rgba(37,99,235,.18);border-radius:999px;background:var(--docs-edit-link-surface,linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.98) 0%,rgba(239,246,255,.98) 100%));box-shadow:var(--docs-edit-link-shadow,0 14px 34px rgba(37,99,235,.12));color:var(--sl-color-text-high,#1f2937);font:600 var(--sl-text-sm,.875rem)/1.2 var(--sl-font);text-decoration:none;transition:transform 180ms ease-out,border-color 180ms ease-out,box-shadow 180ms ease-out,background 180ms ease-out,color 180ms ease-out}.ds-edit-link svg{width:1rem;height:1rem;color:var(--sl-color-text-accent,#245ea8)}.ds-edit-link:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:rgba(37,99,235,.34);box-shadow:var(--docs-edit-link-shadow-strong,0 20px 40px rgba(37,99,235,.18));background:var(--docs-edit-link-surface-hover,linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,1) 0%,rgba(219,234,254,1) 100%));color:var(--sl-color-white,#1f2937)}.ds-edit-link:focus-visible{outline:2px solid rgba(59,130,246,.28);outline-offset:3px}

components.name: Header Nav Link
components.description: Compact text-first navigation pill for header utility routes.

components.name: Language Trigger
components.description: Compact pill trigger that opens the locale dialog without overwhelming the header.
components.css: .ds-language-trigger{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.55rem;min-height:2.25rem;padding:0 .875rem;border:1px solid var(--sl-color-gray-5,#d6dee8);border-radius:999px;background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--sl-color-black,#fbfcfe) 8%,transparent);color:var(--sl-color-text-high,#1f2937);font:500 var(--sl-text-sm,.875rem)/1.2 var(--sl-font);cursor:pointer;transition:background-color 180ms ease-out,border-color 180ms ease-out,transform 180ms ease-out}.ds-language-trigger svg{width:.875rem;height:.875rem;transition:transform 180ms ease-out}.ds-language-trigger:hover{background:var(--sl-color-gray-6,#edf2f7);border-color:var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8)}.ds-language-trigger:hover svg{transform:rotate(180deg)}.ds-language-trigger:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Selected Language Option
components.description: Locale card pattern for active selection inside the language dialog.
components.css: .ds-language-option{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.45rem;min-height:4.75rem;width:100%;padding:.85rem;border:1px solid var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8);border-radius:.875rem;background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8) 18%,transparent);color:var(--sl-color-text-high,#1f2937);font:700 .95rem/1.25 var(--sl-font);text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:background-color 180ms ease-out,border-color 180ms ease-out,transform 180ms ease-out}.ds-language-option:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8) 24%,transparent)}.ds-language-option:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8);outline-offset:2px}.ds-language-option__badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:1.45rem;padding:0 .55rem;border-radius:999px;background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8) 18%,transparent);color:var(--sl-color-accent-high,#245ea8);font:700 .75rem/1 var(--sl-font)}

narrative.overview:
HagiCode Docs should feel like a field manual prepared by an experienced maintainer, not a campaign microsite and not a generic SaaS shell. Readers usually arrive with a job to finish: install the product, compare release behavior, verify a route, copy a preset, or recover context after search. The visual system keeps chrome cool, quiet, and highly legible so the documentation itself remains the main event.

The site uses pale slate surfaces in light mode and deep slate surfaces in dark mode, but both themes stay inside the same restrained temperature band. Accent blue provides orientation and action. Teal and green appear as supporting notes, never as competing brand voices. Motion exists for affordance, not spectacle: pill controls lift slightly, dialogs open with clear depth, and utility CTAs carry just enough polish to feel maintained. It explicitly rejects neon cyberpunk AI styling, glassmorphism-heavy panels, oversized marketing hero theatrics, and dashboard-like card spam.
keyCharacteristics: Cool paper surfaces with dark-slate reading ink.
One calm bilingual sans-serif voice across navigation, prose, and UI.
Selective accent lift for action, focus, and confirmation.
Utility-first components that stay readable on long documents and dense navigation.

rules.name: The One Beacon Rule
rules.body: Blue is the only primary orientation color. Teal and green may support it, but they never compete with it for navigational authority.

rules.name: The Same Horizon Rule
rules.body: Light mode and dark mode must feel like the same product under different lighting, not two separate brands stitched together.

rules.name: The Mixed-Script Rule
rules.body: Chinese and Latin content share one calm UI voice. Do not introduce decorative display faces that fracture bilingual rhythm or make localized pages feel like different products.

rules.name: The Hover-Only Lift Rule
rules.body: Resting documentation surfaces stay grounded. Depth appears only as a response to focus, hover, dialog state, or media emphasis.

dos: Do keep page backgrounds slightly cooled (#fbfcfe in light mode, #0f1724 in dark mode) instead of falling back to pure white or pure black.
Do reserve blue for action, focus, selection, and route orientation so it retains authority.
Do use borders before shadows, and add shadow only when a surface genuinely needs lift.
Do keep documentation controls compact and decisive, with labels that scan quickly in both Chinese and English.
Do honor reduced-motion settings by disabling looping or decorative animation when users opt out.
donts: Don't turn the docs into a neon cyberpunk AI site with glowing accents, black-purple atmospherics, or decorative futurism.
Don't use glassmorphism-heavy panels as the default container style.
Don't inject oversized marketing hero theatrics, vanity metrics, or promotional layouts that interrupt reading flow.
Don't rely on decorative gradients as the primary voice outside focused utility CTAs such as install actions.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders on cards, list items, or callouts. If a surface needs emphasis, solve it with full-surface tint, iconography, stronger heading contrast, or better layout.
